name: Nikolay Nakorkeshko
subtitle: Unity Software Engineer | Unity Developer @ Playrix
summary: Unity Software Engineer focused on gameplay systems, technical architecture, and developer tooling.
I enjoy building scalable systems and tools that help teams develop and iterate on game mechanics efficiently.
Interested in complex technical problems, performance optimization, and maintainable game architecture.

experience.title: Unity Developer
description: Code owner of a modular Player Guidance System used across multiple gameplay contexts (locations, UI flows, quests, and dynamic gameplay features).
Redesigned the legacy architecture of the Player Guidance System and implemented async and deferred execution pipelines.
Reduced guidance request processing time 300ms → 5ms on average (~60x improvement, 50ms 1% low).
Expanded supported gameplay scenarios 6x while maintaining low guidance request latency.

Developed a high-performance alternative to Unity Gizmos API, preserving API compatibility while achieving ~6x faster rendering, enabling the Location Editor to render large amounts of debug geometry smoothly.
Led migration of the articy:draft X plugin, enabling cross-platform development workflows for macOS and Windows.
Delivered gameplay systems, UI features, and custom Unity editor tooling to support content production and game development workflows.

experience.title: Unity Developer
description: Implemented a CPU-bound light simulation system for gameplay features, replicating Unity built-in lighting behaviour.
Contributed to gameplay systems, tools, and general project development

experience.title: Lead Unity Developer
description: Led development of gameplay systems and platform integrations for two mobile F2P games in a small startup team.
Designed and implemented a modular combat system with abilities for a midcore RPG autobattler.
Integrated in-app purchases and multiple third-party SDKs including analytics, advertising, and monetization services.
Implemented backend integration with PlayFab to support live operations and player services.
Integrated native Android functionality and Java libraries for platform-specific features.

experience.title: Indie Game Developer
experience.description: Freelancer, and lonely Game Developer. Creating games for Web portals, small game sites, contests

education.degree: Bachelor's degree, Applied Informatics in Economics
